purpose: Forward-test template selection, factual preservation, aesthetic reasoning, and mobile QA. Do not expose expected_template to the agent under test.

cases.request: Create a 3:4 Xiaohongshu cover for one beauty-brand launch with one supplied product, date, and one benefit.
assertions: date and benefit have protected fields

cases.request: Make a hero poster containing a title, date, five benefits, six rules, and one product.
assertions: details move to a secondary card

cases.request: Design a four-day livestream schedule with today's session emphasized.
Fit seven daily sessions into one 3:4 mobile poster.
assertions: does not compress seven tiny columns

cases.request: Create a reusable transparent date/time strip for insertion between WeChat article sections.
assertions: exact date and time are typeset deterministically

cases.request: Generate the time capsule directly as an image with Chinese date and CTA.
assertions: does not ask the image model to draw exact Chinese copy

cases.request: Create a product story card from one package shot, two detail images, and three supplied selling points.
Use image A for the cat character, image B for style, and image C for the product; change nothing else.
assertions: character, style, and product are not cross-contaminated

cases.request: Create a 3:4 list of four equal-priority products with name and two selling points each.
Show an instant price, coupon, membership subsidy, and red-envelope-after price for several products.
Build a long-form regional food story with six chapters, real place names, products, and a closing live date.
Turn a craft story into a Chinese-style long graphic without a supplied visual reference.
assertions: derives motifs from the actual craft
avoids generic clouds, seals, and brush texture

cases.request: Create a guessing-game poster whose answer must not appear until tomorrow.
assertions: rules and announcement time are protected

cases.request: Create a benefit poster with six conditions and a required disclaimer.
assertions: does not compress rules into unreadable copy
